## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategic direction and growth plans for GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two main paths: 1) Go all-in on content/SEO niche 2) Diversify quickly into broader AI/software services ("Athena model")](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Lean towards Athena model for now - build training/enablement offerings, but validate demand via workshops first](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Explore incentive structures to align interests (revenue shares, equity if fundraising, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Opportunity to be the go-to "university" for practical AI training as the space evolves rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

## Topics

### Content/SEO Agency Path

  - [Already decent traction, could keep building this niche](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [But many competitors, may get commoditized over time](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

### Athena Model (Services/Software)

  - [Diversify into broader AI services/enablement/training](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Treat agency as a cash cow to fund other initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Would likely need to raise funding for this path](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Risks around building software products](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

### Incentive Alignment

  - [Explore revenue shares, equity stakes to incentivize partners](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [But equity complicates taxes/operations if unfunded](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Tie incentives to sustained revenue generation](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

### AI Training Opportunity

  - [With rapid AI evolution, opportunity to be definitive practical training source](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [Create curriculums, certifications, workshops for companies/employees](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [First-mover advantage if can build this out quickly](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Do deeper analysis on incentive models for partners](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Validate demand for specific AI training offerings via workshops](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Prioritize Athena model for now, but keep content/SEO as revenue stream](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Explore fundraising options if going all-in on training/enablement](https://fathom.video/share/ZiWpssMeiNy8DDv_QpqD33HcM9CmyRN5?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
